title: PoLine
$comment: A9 SDK public I/O schema: public-safe purchase-order line reference contract only. A PO line is an optional supporting signal; it is never required for matching (FD-7 / FD-10 / AC-M4). This schema does not close DD-3 and does not declare B2 complete. It carries public identifiers and descriptive reference fields only and must never encode matching logic/weights, trust weights/tiers, scoring or ranking formulas, learning internals, tenant knowledge-graph internals, or any private engine/Core internals.
